<!-- Thanks for contributing to subscribetome! -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore / tests

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this? -->

- [ ] `bun test` passes
- [ ] `node tests-ui/run.mjs` passes (if the dashboard changed)
- [ ] Manually exercised the affected flow

## Checklist

- [ ] No real API key, card number, or other secret appears anywhere in the diff
- [ ] Docs updated (README / DOCS.md / CHANGELOG.md) if behavior changed
- [ ] Considered the security model (SECURITY.md) — a key value must never reach the chat transcript, the DB, or an argv log
